title: Edit Managed Column after added to a board
excerpt: We want to add a new option to an existing Managed Column on a board. The Edit Label option is greyed out with the following message: This column is predefined and cannot be changed. At this time, Managed Columns are pre…

posts.author: AngelaMarie (Angela Ballard)
posts.cookedHtml: We want to add a new option to an existing Managed Column on a board. The Edit Label option is greyed out with the following message: This column is predefined and cannot be changed. At this time, Managed Columns are predefined and cannot be changed once added to a board.
